TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Taimali, title = Taimali, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taimali} }

S.FORM: === Taimali === Taimali a sakuwan ku Taitung. kumud nu kalesakan, 102.29 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 4.53 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 57.38 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 7,128 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 2,979 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 4,782 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 67%(Paiwan, Pangcah) ku kasabinawlan. u Paiwan atu Pangcah ku sakalaniyazu'. na i 2009 a mihcan, izaw ku tabakiay a baliyus u Molake, izaw ku tabakiay a balad, maalul ku niyazu' nu Taimali siang. nikasakuwakuwan Taimali mala 9 a cuwen atu 13 ku niyazu'. kina 13 a niyazu'sa, Lupakatj , Tjavualji , Kiring , Tjatjigel , Anasolay , Davugele , Takidis , Padrangigrang , Calavi , Kanadun , Sasaljak , Lalauran , Cilalongay . Ś§™ťļĽťáĆťĄČ(śéíÁĀ£Ť™ě:TjavualjiÔľõťėŅÁĺéŤ™ě:Tjavualji ÔľõŤáļÁĀ£Ť©Ī:Th√†i-m√Ę-l√≠-hiongÔľõŤáļÁĀ£ŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěŚõõÁł£ŤÖĒ:tai maňá liňä hiongňä) . taymali a kenis taymali a kenis (paywan a kamu : Tjvualji; amis a kamu Tjavualji 1; layak a kamu: Thai-ma-li-hiong; Tawan a ngangay a kamu nu sepatay nu keni a ngiha': tai ma li hiong ) tida i Taywan nu pusung a kenis i sawali satimulan, saamisan micapi tu piwma a kenis, pusung a kenis, sawalian misuayaw tu taypiyan, satipan micapi tu cing-hung a kenis, satipan katimul malalitin tu tazen a kenis, satumulan militin tu ta-u a kenis . 2000 "ÁöĄÁĺéŚźć. kina misudikuday tu cung-yang-san-mayi, midudus kya sadipasan hawsa, u buyu' mamin ku yadahay, u talakaw nu telek satalakaway tusa a malebud a ditek, u demiad sa u caledesay ku bali nu demiad. i labu nu kenis a tademw idaw ku layakay a tademaw tu ‚ÖĒ( u layak, ngayngay, hulam ) atu ‚Öď u yincumin( amis, lukay, paywan ), u kamu nu itiniay nu paywan a kamu atu amis a kamu. tusa a malebud nu mihcaan u nu malebutay nu haynamuh misuayaw tu mahculalay a likad a kawaw kyu kasingangan ninakenisan katabaki, sakasinganganan nu bangcal kina kenisan wini " mahculalay nu cilal a kenis". (Tjavualji), laylay u taymali nau ta-maw-li( Tjavalji ), i paywan a kamu pabaliw satu " u mapacilalay nu cilal kasitayhi' nu damek a lala', i kasumamadan nu lalangawan sa idaw ku sulid sakay i "ta-maw-li", "taymali " sakasingangan. 1920 a mihcaan sumad hantu u "tamali", nadikudan sa i 1937 a mihcaan sumaden aca "taymali-cung", pabalucu aca malu pusung a tusu pusu a kenis ku mikuwanay. sakatusa nu nikalalais tu nadikudan hawsa pasumad hantu tu pusung taymali a kenisan hanikatukuh ayda. śóŹÁĺ§ . u binacadan kina kenis nu binacadan yadah ku sakalisiwan, u paywan a binacadan, amis a binacadan, lukay a binacadan, hulan a tademaw, layak a tademaw atu u ngayngay makakumutay . dumaay a kenisan nu paywan a binacadan u pa-ka-lu-cin (paqaroqarp), u nu sawalian a paywan, u duma sa ta-wang a niyadu', ya u dikuc, u lalangawan matapal nu micapiay tu piwma a binacadan atu amisay a mapalalitay. ŚéüšĹŹśįĎÁ•ĖŚÖąÁôľÁ••ŚúįÁĘĎ lalekalan nu yincumin a lala' nu kelas nipatidengan tu paya nikakeminis i san-he a niyadu' atu huw-yin a niyadu' nu lalekalan nu yincumincu a lala' nu kelas nipatidengan tu paya, unu kasu mamadanay a laylay ku mahiniay, u siacaay nu midangay pacena a pahanhan tu masadumaay nu kaliyuhan a madimutay a aidanga. dayhan u piwma a binacadan, amis a binacadan a kelas nu nakamuan saan sa, sapakalankan tu binacanan a paduduc tu yincumincu a kalas nu satabalay tani i tukuskuyni, micidek ku nipatideng tu sasalisinan nu kakausan u kabulahan a paya, sakay i tini u pidatengan tu babalakiay a imi'. śįĎŚúč49 . min-ko sepat a bataan idaw ku siwa a mihcaan i san-he a niyadu' mitepal tu bayu i buyu' a patideng tu"Taywan nu yincumin u lala' nu lalekalan ", walu a bataan nu mihcaan u i tiniay tu a tademawa ku milahciay, kya u sakahenulan, nauydaan u kisihu maydih misakalisuw a misabaluhay sapisanga tu tabakiay a kenis i lala' nu ahebal atu sasangaan, patetek tu paya sakay nu pacuyakuay a musakamu, u nituktukan ku luma a nisangaan a misakapah pabancal,palangaw tu sumilaway, kyu idaw haynikatukuh ayda tuud. tu mihmihcaan nu pipuybunga a lisin, ce-pen, ciyin-he kini tusaay a kenis nu piwma a tademaw, kanca tayda a patunga tu kelas, saka caay kapawan tu nu kelas a nipaayaw tu dadatengan nu balucu', tung-he a kenis u tu-lan a niyadu' u amis atademaw nu binacadan miduduc tu kawaw nu babalaki sakay nu tademaw, sisa i tini palekal tu sasalisinan, pademiad kanca tayni a patungas tu kelas u dadateng tu nabalucuan. šļļŚŹ£ÁĶĄśąź kasaupu nu tademaw kinakenis a tademaw ‚ÖĒ u layak a binacadan, u dumaan sa 1/3 u binacada mamin, u yincumin ku yadahay nu binacadan ku muenengay i ta-wang, pi-li, siyang-lan, cin-lun, tu-ling atu te-ci-li. sakadumaan , u paywan a binacadan ku yadahay a muenen i ta-wang a kenis, sin-siyang-lan aniyadu',cin-lung a kenis atu tu-ling a kenis, u amis a binacadan sa i linubu nu hekal a muenen, nu malumanay a cin-lan atu u te-ci-li.s śóÖťĀä piidangan , tay-ma-li a kenis u a adihan yadah ku sinilangecan, idaw ku buyu' idaw ku bayu, idaw ku ungsing, u kasibaluan, u pikacawan tu silamalay, Ś§öŤČĮÁĀęŤĽä„Ąď„ĄĘňčtu-liyang a pikacawan nu silamalay tu-liyang a pikacawan nu silamalay unu naayaway tu a pikacawan nu silamalay, i nai' ku kawaw dayhan i 2006 a mihcaan pitu a bulad idaw ku cacay a demiad nai' tu ku kawaw tu sakay i pidangan, uyida a mihcaan sa cacay bataan nu bulad idaw ku cacay a demiad u tatengaay tu malawpes. anu micumud u tuki tu demidemiad nu sananal pituay a tuki katukuh i kalabian enemay ku tuki, u sasinanutan a misakapah sa cacay a tademaw cacay a bataan nu kalisiw. inapikacawan i naayaw unu masatukusay, a buyu', timuan a dadan nu silamalay sasangan a kakitidaan masaduma ku nisunpuan tu talakaway a pikacawan tusilamalay, cacay a tatalakawan u pihahalan tu silamalay atu picakayan tu paya, sakatusa a talakawan u kakacawan, ya kakacawan sa idaw ku sumanahay a nilangatan u masadumaay u katinengan, mutiden itida hawsa tanen tu namakapabaw a miadih tu cacekawan i taypinyang a bayu, kasingangan nu Taywan u sabangcalay nu silamalay a pikacawan, sisa katuut ku tayniay midang a miadih tu dadan nu simukinay. . u cin-cen, lo-se a balu, ngipi, sikiyaw, pu-lu-mi', uciya, hu-long a heci, bila', balu, usal, kuhi. ťáĎťáĚŚĪĪšľĎťĖíŤĺ≤ś•≠ŚćÄ cin-cen a buyu' u lalalayan a sinilangec tu sikalisiw, idaw ku sawac idaw ku cascas idaw ku talakaway a buyu' idaw hen ku masaapilisay a sawac. i tiniay a sawacsawacan u kapahay a kitidaan nu adipawnay, anu makatukuh tu i sepatay-pituay a bulat u sandeb u piadihan tu adipawnay a demiad. anu asipen i cin-cen a buyu' hakay idaw ku cacay bataan idaw ku waluay a adipawnay, u angangan a masdumaay u lubeniay a sakubad nu adipawnay, anu masungaliw tu ku lalutay, kasienawannay i cacay a bataan idaw kucacay-cacay a bataan idaw ku tusaay a bulad nu i buyu'ay a dipawnay nu tamaay u kalawlawan ku baluwang tu a adihan.
S.PHON: === taimar~…ĺi === taimar~…ĺi a sakuwan ku taituŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti *.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paiwan, paŇč ¶ańß) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u paiwan atu paŇč ¶ańß ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. na i **** a mińß ¶an, izaw ku tabakiaj a bar~…ĺijus u mor~…ĺak…ô, izaw ku tabakiaj a bar~…ĺad, maar~…ĺur~…ĺ ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu taimar~…ĺi siaŇč. nikasakuwakuwan taimar~…ĺi mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, r~…ĺupakatj , tja*uar~…ĺji , kiriŇč , tjatjig…ôr~…ĺ , anasor~…ĺaj , da*ug…ôr~…ĺ…ô , takidis , padraŇčigraŇč , ¶ar~…ĺa*i , kanadun , sasar~…ĺjak , r~…ĺar~…ĺauran , ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺoŇčaj . ****(***:tja*uar~…ĺji****:tja*uar~…ĺji ****:tńß*i-m*-r~…ĺ*-ńßioŇč*********:tai ma* r~…ĺi* ńßioŇč*) . tajmar~…ĺi a k…ônis tajmar~…ĺi a k…ônis (pajwan a kamu : tj*uar~…ĺji; amis a kamu tja*uar~…ĺji *; r~…ĺajak a kamu: tńßai-ma-r~…ĺi-ńßioŇč; tawan a ŇčaŇčaj a kamu nu s…ôpataj nu k…ôni a Ňčińßa Ē~ °: tai ma r~…ĺi ńßioŇč ) tida i tajwan nu pusuŇč a k…ônis i sawar~…ĺi satimur~…ĺan, saamisan mi ¶api tu piwma a k…ônis, pusuŇč a k…ônis, sawar~…ĺian misuajaw tu tajpijan, satipan mi ¶api tu ¶iŇč-ńßuŇč a k…ônis, satipan katimur~…ĺ mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu taz…ôn a k…ônis, satumur~…ĺan mir~…ĺitin tu ta-u a k…ônis . **** "***. kina misudikudaj tu ¶uŇč-jaŇč-san-maji, midudus kja sadipasan ńßawsa, u buju Ē~ ° mamin ku jadańßaj, u tar~…ĺakaw nu t…ôr~…ĺ…ôk satar~…ĺakawaj tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbud a dit…ôk, u d…ômiad sa u ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj ku bar~…ĺi nu d…ômiad. i r~…ĺabu nu k…ônis a tad…ômw idaw ku r~…ĺajakaj a tad…ômaw tu *( u r~…ĺajak, ŇčajŇčaj, ńßur~…ĺam ) atu * u jin ¶umin( amis, r~…ĺukaj, pajwan ), u kamu nu itiniaj nu pajwan a kamu atu amis a kamu. tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbud nu mińß ¶aan u nu mar~…ĺ…ôbutaj nu ńßajnamuńß misuajaw tu mańß ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺikad a kawaw kju kasiŇčaŇčan ninak…ônisan katabaki, sakasiŇčaŇčanan nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ kina k…ônisan wini " mańß ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ a k…ônis". (tja*uar~…ĺji), r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj u tajmar~…ĺi nau ta-maw-r~…ĺi( tja*ar~…ĺji ), i pajwan a kamu pabar~…ĺiw satu " u mapa ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ kasitajńßi Ē~ ° nu dam…ôk a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, i kasumamadan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan sa idaw ku sur~…ĺid sakaj i "ta-maw-r~…ĺi", "tajmar~…ĺi " sakasiŇčaŇčan. **** a mińß ¶aan sumad ńßantu u "tamar~…ĺi", nadikudan sa i **** a mińß ¶aan sumad…ôn a ¶a "tajmar~…ĺi- ¶uŇč", pabar~…ĺu ¶u a ¶a mar~…ĺu pusuŇč a tusu pusu a k…ônis ku mikuwanaj. sakatusa nu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺais tu nadikudan ńßawsa pasumad ńßantu tu pusuŇč tajmar~…ĺi a k…ônisan ńßanikatukuńß ajda. ** . u bina ¶adan kina k…ônis nu bina ¶adan jadańß ku sakar~…ĺisiwan, u pajwan a bina ¶adan, amis a bina ¶adan, r~…ĺukaj a bina ¶adan, ńßur~…ĺan a tad…ômaw, r~…ĺajak a tad…ômaw atu u ŇčajŇčaj makakumutaj . dumaaj a k…ônisan nu pajwan a bina ¶adan u pa-ka-r~…ĺu- ¶in (pa*aro*arp), u nu sawar~…ĺian a pajwan, u duma sa ta-waŇč a nijadu Ē~ °, ja u diku ¶, u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan matapar~…ĺ nu mi ¶apiaj tu piwma a bina ¶adan atu amisaj a mapar~…ĺar~…ĺitaj. ********* r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu jin ¶umin a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu k…ôr~…ĺas nipatid…ôŇčan tu paja nikak…ôminis i san-ńß…ô a nijadu Ē~ ° atu ńßuw-jin a nijadu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu jin ¶umin ¶u a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu k…ôr~…ĺas nipatid…ôŇčan tu paja, unu kasu mamadanaj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ku mańßiniaj, u sia ¶aaj nu midaŇčaj pa ¶…ôna a pańßanńßan tu masadumaaj nu kar~…ĺijuńßan a madimutaj a aidaŇča. dajńßan u piwma a bina ¶adan, amis a bina ¶adan a k…ôr~…ĺas nu nakamuan saan sa, sapakar~…ĺankan tu bina ¶anan a padudu ¶ tu jin ¶umin ¶u a kar~…ĺas nu satabar~…ĺaj tani i tukuskujni, mi ¶id…ôk ku nipatid…ôŇč tu sasar~…ĺisinan nu kakausan u kabur~…ĺańßan a paja, sakaj i tini u pidat…ôŇčan tu babar~…ĺakiaj a imi Ē~ °. **** . min-ko s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku siwa a mińß ¶aan i san-ńß…ô a nijadu Ē~ ° mit…ôpar~…ĺ tu baju i buju Ē~ ° a patid…ôŇč tu"tajwan nu jin ¶umin u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan ", war~…ĺu a bataan nu mińß ¶aan u i tiniaj tu a tad…ômawa ku mir~…ĺańß ¶iaj, kja u sakańß…ônur~…ĺan, naujdaan u kisińßu majdińß misakar~…ĺisuw a misabar~…ĺuńßaj sapisaŇča tu tabakiaj a k…ônis i r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺ atu sasaŇčaan, pat…ôt…ôk tu paja sakaj nu pa ¶ujakuaj a musakamu, u nituktukan ku r~…ĺuma a nisaŇčaan a misakapańß paban ¶ar~…ĺ,par~…ĺaŇčaw tu sumir~…ĺawaj, kju idaw ńßajnikatukuńß ajda tuud. tu mińßmińß ¶aan nu pipujbuŇča a r~…ĺisin, ¶…ô-p…ôn, ¶ijin-ńß…ô kini tusaaj a k…ônis nu piwma a tad…ômaw, kan ¶a tajda a patuŇča tu k…ôr~…ĺas, saka ¶aaj kapawan tu nu k…ôr~…ĺas a nipaajaw tu dadat…ôŇčan nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, tuŇč-ńß…ô a k…ônis u tu-r~…ĺan a nijadu Ē~ ° u amis atad…ômaw nu bina ¶adan midudu ¶ tu kawaw nu babar~…ĺaki sakaj nu tad…ômaw, sisa i tini par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu sasar~…ĺisinan, pad…ômiad kan ¶a tajni a patuŇčas tu k…ôr~…ĺas u dadat…ôŇč tu nabar~…ĺu ¶uan. **** kasaupu nu tad…ômaw kinak…ônis a tad…ômaw * u r~…ĺajak a bina ¶adan, u dumaan sa */* u bina ¶ada mamin, u jin ¶umin ku jadańßaj nu bina ¶adan ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i ta-waŇč, pi-r~…ĺi, sijaŇč-r~…ĺan, ¶in-r~…ĺun, tu-r~…ĺiŇč atu t…ô- ¶i-r~…ĺi. sakadumaan , u pajwan a bina ¶adan ku jadańßaj a mu…ôn…ôn i ta-waŇč a k…ônis, sin-sijaŇč-r~…ĺan anijadu Ē~ °, ¶in-r~…ĺuŇč a k…ônis atu tu-r~…ĺiŇč a k…ônis, u amis a bina ¶adan sa i r~…ĺinubu nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a mu…ôn…ôn, nu mar~…ĺumanaj a ¶in-r~…ĺan atu u t…ô- ¶i-r~…ĺi.s ** piidaŇčan , taj-ma-r~…ĺi a k…ônis u a adińßan jadańß ku sinir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶an, idaw ku buju Ē~ ° idaw ku baju, idaw ku uŇčsiŇč, u kasibar~…ĺuan, u pika ¶awan tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, *******tu-r~…ĺijaŇč a pika ¶awan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj tu-r~…ĺijaŇč a pika ¶awan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj unu naajawaj tu a pika ¶awan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, i nai Ē~ ° ku kawaw dajńßan i **** a mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺad idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad nai Ē~ ° tu ku kawaw tu sakaj i pidaŇčan, ujida a mińß ¶aan sa ¶a ¶aj bataan nu bur~…ĺad idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad u tat…ôŇčaaj tu mar~…ĺawp…ôs. anu mi ¶umud u tuki tu d…ômid…ômiad nu sananar~…ĺ pituaj a tuki katukuńß i kar~…ĺabian …ôn…ômaj ku tuki, u sasinanutan a misakapańß sa ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômaw ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu kar~…ĺisiw. inapika ¶awan i naajaw unu masatukusaj, a buju Ē~ °, timuan a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj sasaŇčan a kakitidaan masaduma ku nisunpuan tu tar~…ĺakawaj a pika ¶awan tusir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, ¶a ¶aj a tatar~…ĺakawan u pińßańßar~…ĺan tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj atu pi ¶akajan tu paja, sakatusa a tar~…ĺakawan u kaka ¶awan, ja kaka ¶awan sa idaw ku sumanańßaj a nir~…ĺaŇčatan u masadumaaj u katin…ôŇčan, mutid…ôn itida ńßawsa tan…ôn tu namakapabaw a miadińß tu ¶a ¶…ôkawan i tajpinjaŇč a baju, kasiŇčaŇčan nu tajwan u sabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a pika ¶awan, sisa katuut ku tajniaj midaŇč a miadińß tu dadan nu simukinaj. . u ¶in- ¶…ôn, r~…ĺo-s…ô a bar~…ĺu, Ňčipi, sikijaw, pu-r~…ĺu-mi Ē~ °, u ¶ija, ńßu-r~…ĺoŇč a ńß…ô ¶i, bir~…ĺa Ē~ °, bar~…ĺu, usar~…ĺ, kuńßi. ******** ¶in- ¶…ôn a buju Ē~ ° u r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺajan a sinir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶ tu sikar~…ĺisiw, idaw ku sawa ¶ idaw ku ¶as ¶as idaw ku tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° idaw ńß…ôn ku masaapir~…ĺisaj a sawa ¶. i tiniaj a sawa ¶sawa ¶an u kapańßaj a kitidaan nu adipawnaj, anu makatukuńß tu i s…ôpataj-pituaj a bur~…ĺat u sand…ôb u piadińßan tu adipawnaj a d…ômiad. anu asip…ôn i ¶in- ¶…ôn a buju Ē~ ° ńßakaj idaw ku ¶a ¶aj bataan idaw ku war~…ĺuaj a adipawnaj, u aŇčaŇčan a masdumaaj u r~…ĺub…ôniaj a sakubad nu adipawnaj, anu masuŇčar~…ĺiw tu ku r~…ĺar~…ĺutaj, kasi…ônawannaj i ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj- ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tusaaj a bur~…ĺad nu i buju Ē~ °aj a dipawnaj nu tamaaj u kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan ku bar~…ĺuwaŇč tu a adińßan.
S.FORM: === Taimali === Taimali a sakuwan ku Taitung. kumud nu kalesakan, 102.29 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 4.53 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 57.38 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 7,128 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 2,979 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 4,782 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 67%(Paiwan, Pangcah) ku kasabinawlan. u Paiwan atu Pangcah ku sakalaniyazu'. na i 2009 a mihcan, izaw ku tabakiay a baliyus u Molake, izaw ku tabakiay a balad, maalul ku niyazu' nu Taimali siang. nikasakuwakuwan Taimali mala 9 a cuwen atu 13 ku niyazu'. kina 13 a niyazu'sa, Lupakatj , Tjavualji , Kiring , Tjatjigel , Anasolay , Davugele , Takidis , Padrangigrang , Calavi , Kanadun , Sasaljak , Lalauran , Cilalongay . Ś§™ťļĽťáĆťĄČ(śéíÁĀ£Ť™ě:TjavualjiÔľõťėŅÁĺéŤ™ě:Tjavualji ÔľõŤáļÁĀ£Ť©Ī:Th√†i-m√Ę-l√≠-hiongÔľõŤáļÁĀ£ŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěŚõõÁł£ŤÖĒ:tai maňá liňä hiongňä) . taymali a kenis taymali a kenis (paywan a kamu : Tjvualji; amis a kamu Tjavualji 1; layak a kamu: Thai-ma-li-hiong; Tawan a ngangay a kamu nu sepatay nu keni a ngiha': tai ma li hiong ) tida i Taywan nu pusung a kenis i sawali satimulan, saamisan micapi tu piwma a kenis, pusung a kenis, sawalian misuayaw tu taypiyan, satipan micapi tu cing-hung a kenis, satipan katimul malalitin tu tazen a kenis, satumulan militin tu ta-u a kenis . 2000 "ÁöĄÁĺéŚźć. kina misudikuday tu cung-yang-san-mayi, midudus kya sadipasan hawsa, u buyu' mamin ku yadahay, u talakaw nu telek satalakaway tusa a malebud a ditek, u demiad sa u caledesay ku bali nu demiad. i labu nu kenis a tademw idaw ku layakay a tademaw tu ‚ÖĒ( u layak, ngayngay, hulam ) atu ‚Öď u yincumin( amis, lukay, paywan ), u kamu nu itiniay nu paywan a kamu atu amis a kamu. tusa a malebud nu mihcaan u nu malebutay nu haynamuh misuayaw tu mahculalay a likad a kawaw kyu kasingangan ninakenisan katabaki, sakasinganganan nu bangcal kina kenisan wini " mahculalay nu cilal a kenis". (Tjavualji), laylay u taymali nau ta-maw-li( Tjavalji ), i paywan a kamu pabaliw satu " u mapacilalay nu cilal kasitayhi' nu damek a lala', i kasumamadan nu lalangawan sa idaw ku sulid sakay i "ta-maw-li", "taymali " sakasingangan. 1920 a mihcaan sumad hantu u "tamali", nadikudan sa i 1937 a mihcaan sumaden aca "taymali-cung", pabalucu aca malu pusung a tusu pusu a kenis ku mikuwanay. sakatusa nu nikalalais tu nadikudan hawsa pasumad hantu tu pusung taymali a kenisan hanikatukuh ayda. śóŹÁĺ§ . u binacadan kina kenis nu binacadan yadah ku sakalisiwan, u paywan a binacadan, amis a binacadan, lukay a binacadan, hulan a tademaw, layak a tademaw atu u ngayngay makakumutay . dumaay a kenisan nu paywan a binacadan u pa-ka-lu-cin (paqaroqarp), u nu sawalian a paywan, u duma sa ta-wang a niyadu', ya u dikuc, u lalangawan matapal nu micapiay tu piwma a binacadan atu amisay a mapalalitay. ŚéüšĹŹśįĎÁ•ĖŚÖąÁôľÁ••ŚúįÁĘĎ lalekalan nu yincumin a lala' nu kelas nipatidengan tu paya nikakeminis i san-he a niyadu' atu huw-yin a niyadu' nu lalekalan nu yincumincu a lala' nu kelas nipatidengan tu paya, unu kasu mamadanay a laylay ku mahiniay, u siacaay nu midangay pacena a pahanhan tu masadumaay nu kaliyuhan a madimutay a aidanga. dayhan u piwma a binacadan, amis a binacadan a kelas nu nakamuan saan sa, sapakalankan tu binacanan a paduduc tu yincumincu a kalas nu satabalay tani i tukuskuyni, micidek ku nipatideng tu sasalisinan nu kakausan u kabulahan a paya, sakay i tini u pidatengan tu babalakiay a imi'. śįĎŚúč49 . min-ko sepat a bataan idaw ku siwa a mihcaan i san-he a niyadu' mitepal tu bayu i buyu' a patideng tu"Taywan nu yincumin u lala' nu lalekalan ", walu a bataan nu mihcaan u i tiniay tu a tademawa ku milahciay, kya u sakahenulan, nauydaan u kisihu maydih misakalisuw a misabaluhay sapisanga tu tabakiay a kenis i lala' nu ahebal atu sasangaan, patetek tu paya sakay nu pacuyakuay a musakamu, u nituktukan ku luma a nisangaan a misakapah pabancal,palangaw tu sumilaway, kyu idaw haynikatukuh ayda tuud. tu mihmihcaan nu pipuybunga a lisin, ce-pen, ciyin-he kini tusaay a kenis nu piwma a tademaw, kanca tayda a patunga tu kelas, saka caay kapawan tu nu kelas a nipaayaw tu dadatengan nu balucu', tung-he a kenis u tu-lan a niyadu' u amis atademaw nu binacadan miduduc tu kawaw nu babalaki sakay nu tademaw, sisa i tini palekal tu sasalisinan, pademiad kanca tayni a patungas tu kelas u dadateng tu nabalucuan. šļļŚŹ£ÁĶĄśąź kasaupu nu tademaw kinakenis a tademaw ‚ÖĒ u layak a binacadan, u dumaan sa 1/3 u binacada mamin, u yincumin ku yadahay nu binacadan ku muenengay i ta-wang, pi-li, siyang-lan, cin-lun, tu-ling atu te-ci-li. sakadumaan , u paywan a binacadan ku yadahay a muenen i ta-wang a kenis, sin-siyang-lan aniyadu',cin-lung a kenis atu tu-ling a kenis, u amis a binacadan sa i linubu nu hekal a muenen, nu malumanay a cin-lan atu u te-ci-li.s śóÖťĀä piidangan , tay-ma-li a kenis u a adihan yadah ku sinilangecan, idaw ku buyu' idaw ku bayu, idaw ku ungsing, u kasibaluan, u pikacawan tu silamalay, Ś§öŤČĮÁĀęŤĽä„Ąď„ĄĘňčtu-liyang a pikacawan nu silamalay tu-liyang a pikacawan nu silamalay unu naayaway tu a pikacawan nu silamalay, i nai' ku kawaw dayhan i 2006 a mihcaan pitu a bulad idaw ku cacay a demiad nai' tu ku kawaw tu sakay i pidangan, uyida a mihcaan sa cacay bataan nu bulad idaw ku cacay a demiad u tatengaay tu malawpes. anu micumud u tuki tu demidemiad nu sananal pituay a tuki katukuh i kalabian enemay ku tuki, u sasinanutan a misakapah sa cacay a tademaw cacay a bataan nu kalisiw. inapikacawan i naayaw unu masatukusay, a buyu', timuan a dadan nu silamalay sasangan a kakitidaan masaduma ku nisunpuan tu talakaway a pikacawan tusilamalay, cacay a tatalakawan u pihahalan tu silamalay atu picakayan tu paya, sakatusa a talakawan u kakacawan, ya kakacawan sa idaw ku sumanahay a nilangatan u masadumaay u katinengan, mutiden itida hawsa tanen tu namakapabaw a miadih tu cacekawan i taypinyang a bayu, kasingangan nu Taywan u sabangcalay nu silamalay a pikacawan, sisa katuut ku tayniay midang a miadih tu dadan nu simukinay. . u cin-cen, lo-se a balu, ngipi, sikiyaw, pu-lu-mi', uciya, hu-long a heci, bila', balu, usal, kuhi. ťáĎťáĚŚĪĪšľĎťĖíŤĺ≤ś•≠ŚćÄ cin-cen a buyu' u lalalayan a sinilangec tu sikalisiw, idaw ku sawac idaw ku cascas idaw ku talakaway a buyu' idaw hen ku masaapilisay a sawac. i tiniay a sawacsawacan u kapahay a kitidaan nu adipawnay, anu makatukuh tu i sepatay-pituay a bulat u sandeb u piadihan tu adipawnay a demiad. anu asipen i cin-cen a buyu' hakay idaw ku cacay bataan idaw ku waluay a adipawnay, u angangan a masdumaay u lubeniay a sakubad nu adipawnay, anu masungaliw tu ku lalutay, kasienawannay i cacay a bataan idaw kucacay-cacay a bataan idaw ku tusaay a bulad nu i buyu'ay a dipawnay nu tamaay u kalawlawan ku baluwang tu a adihan.
S.PHON: === taimar~…ĺi === taimar~…ĺi a sakuwan ku taituŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti *.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paiwan, paŇč ¶ańß) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u paiwan atu paŇč ¶ańß ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. na i **** a mińß ¶an, izaw ku tabakiaj a bar~…ĺijus u mor~…ĺak…ô, izaw ku tabakiaj a bar~…ĺad, maar~…ĺur~…ĺ ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu taimar~…ĺi siaŇč. nikasakuwakuwan taimar~…ĺi mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, r~…ĺupakatj , tja*uar~…ĺji , kiriŇč , tjatjig…ôr~…ĺ , anasor~…ĺaj , da*ug…ôr~…ĺ…ô , takidis , padraŇčigraŇč , ¶ar~…ĺa*i , kanadun , sasar~…ĺjak , r~…ĺar~…ĺauran , ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺoŇčaj . ****(***:tja*uar~…ĺji****:tja*uar~…ĺji ****:tńß*i-m*-r~…ĺ*-ńßioŇč*********:tai ma* r~…ĺi* ńßioŇč*) . tajmar~…ĺi a k…ônis tajmar~…ĺi a k…ônis (pajwan a kamu : tj*uar~…ĺji; amis a kamu tja*uar~…ĺji *; r~…ĺajak a kamu: tńßai-ma-r~…ĺi-ńßioŇč; tawan a ŇčaŇčaj a kamu nu s…ôpataj nu k…ôni a Ňčińßa Ē~ °: tai ma r~…ĺi ńßioŇč ) tida i tajwan nu pusuŇč a k…ônis i sawar~…ĺi satimur~…ĺan, saamisan mi ¶api tu piwma a k…ônis, pusuŇč a k…ônis, sawar~…ĺian misuajaw tu tajpijan, satipan mi ¶api tu ¶iŇč-ńßuŇč a k…ônis, satipan katimur~…ĺ mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu taz…ôn a k…ônis, satumur~…ĺan mir~…ĺitin tu ta-u a k…ônis . **** "***. kina misudikudaj tu ¶uŇč-jaŇč-san-maji, midudus kja sadipasan ńßawsa, u buju Ē~ ° mamin ku jadańßaj, u tar~…ĺakaw nu t…ôr~…ĺ…ôk satar~…ĺakawaj tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbud a dit…ôk, u d…ômiad sa u ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj ku bar~…ĺi nu d…ômiad. i r~…ĺabu nu k…ônis a tad…ômw idaw ku r~…ĺajakaj a tad…ômaw tu *( u r~…ĺajak, ŇčajŇčaj, ńßur~…ĺam ) atu * u jin ¶umin( amis, r~…ĺukaj, pajwan ), u kamu nu itiniaj nu pajwan a kamu atu amis a kamu. tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbud nu mińß ¶aan u nu mar~…ĺ…ôbutaj nu ńßajnamuńß misuajaw tu mańß ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺikad a kawaw kju kasiŇčaŇčan ninak…ônisan katabaki, sakasiŇčaŇčanan nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ kina k…ônisan wini " mańß ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ a k…ônis". (tja*uar~…ĺji), r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj u tajmar~…ĺi nau ta-maw-r~…ĺi( tja*ar~…ĺji ), i pajwan a kamu pabar~…ĺiw satu " u mapa ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ kasitajńßi Ē~ ° nu dam…ôk a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, i kasumamadan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan sa idaw ku sur~…ĺid sakaj i "ta-maw-r~…ĺi", "tajmar~…ĺi " sakasiŇčaŇčan. **** a mińß ¶aan sumad ńßantu u "tamar~…ĺi", nadikudan sa i **** a mińß ¶aan sumad…ôn a ¶a "tajmar~…ĺi- ¶uŇč", pabar~…ĺu ¶u a ¶a mar~…ĺu pusuŇč a tusu pusu a k…ônis ku mikuwanaj. sakatusa nu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺais tu nadikudan ńßawsa pasumad ńßantu tu pusuŇč tajmar~…ĺi a k…ônisan ńßanikatukuńß ajda. ** . u bina ¶adan kina k…ônis nu bina ¶adan jadańß ku sakar~…ĺisiwan, u pajwan a bina ¶adan, amis a bina ¶adan, r~…ĺukaj a bina ¶adan, ńßur~…ĺan a tad…ômaw, r~…ĺajak a tad…ômaw atu u ŇčajŇčaj makakumutaj . dumaaj a k…ônisan nu pajwan a bina ¶adan u pa-ka-r~…ĺu- ¶in (pa*aro*arp), u nu sawar~…ĺian a pajwan, u duma sa ta-waŇč a nijadu Ē~ °, ja u diku ¶, u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan matapar~…ĺ nu mi ¶apiaj tu piwma a bina ¶adan atu amisaj a mapar~…ĺar~…ĺitaj. ********* r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu jin ¶umin a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu k…ôr~…ĺas nipatid…ôŇčan tu paja nikak…ôminis i san-ńß…ô a nijadu Ē~ ° atu ńßuw-jin a nijadu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu jin ¶umin ¶u a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu k…ôr~…ĺas nipatid…ôŇčan tu paja, unu kasu mamadanaj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ku mańßiniaj, u sia ¶aaj nu midaŇčaj pa ¶…ôna a pańßanńßan tu masadumaaj nu kar~…ĺijuńßan a madimutaj a aidaŇča. dajńßan u piwma a bina ¶adan, amis a bina ¶adan a k…ôr~…ĺas nu nakamuan saan sa, sapakar~…ĺankan tu bina ¶anan a padudu ¶ tu jin ¶umin ¶u a kar~…ĺas nu satabar~…ĺaj tani i tukuskujni, mi ¶id…ôk ku nipatid…ôŇč tu sasar~…ĺisinan nu kakausan u kabur~…ĺańßan a paja, sakaj i tini u pidat…ôŇčan tu babar~…ĺakiaj a imi Ē~ °. **** . min-ko s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku siwa a mińß ¶aan i san-ńß…ô a nijadu Ē~ ° mit…ôpar~…ĺ tu baju i buju Ē~ ° a patid…ôŇč tu"tajwan nu jin ¶umin u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan ", war~…ĺu a bataan nu mińß ¶aan u i tiniaj tu a tad…ômawa ku mir~…ĺańß ¶iaj, kja u sakańß…ônur~…ĺan, naujdaan u kisińßu majdińß misakar~…ĺisuw a misabar~…ĺuńßaj sapisaŇča tu tabakiaj a k…ônis i r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺ atu sasaŇčaan, pat…ôt…ôk tu paja sakaj nu pa ¶ujakuaj a musakamu, u nituktukan ku r~…ĺuma a nisaŇčaan a misakapańß paban ¶ar~…ĺ,par~…ĺaŇčaw tu sumir~…ĺawaj, kju idaw ńßajnikatukuńß ajda tuud. tu mińßmińß ¶aan nu pipujbuŇča a r~…ĺisin, ¶…ô-p…ôn, ¶ijin-ńß…ô kini tusaaj a k…ônis nu piwma a tad…ômaw, kan ¶a tajda a patuŇča tu k…ôr~…ĺas, saka ¶aaj kapawan tu nu k…ôr~…ĺas a nipaajaw tu dadat…ôŇčan nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, tuŇč-ńß…ô a k…ônis u tu-r~…ĺan a nijadu Ē~ ° u amis atad…ômaw nu bina ¶adan midudu ¶ tu kawaw nu babar~…ĺaki sakaj nu tad…ômaw, sisa i tini par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu sasar~…ĺisinan, pad…ômiad kan ¶a tajni a patuŇčas tu k…ôr~…ĺas u dadat…ôŇč tu nabar~…ĺu ¶uan. **** kasaupu nu tad…ômaw kinak…ônis a tad…ômaw * u r~…ĺajak a bina ¶adan, u dumaan sa */* u bina ¶ada mamin, u jin ¶umin ku jadańßaj nu bina ¶adan ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i ta-waŇč, pi-r~…ĺi, sijaŇč-r~…ĺan, ¶in-r~…ĺun, tu-r~…ĺiŇč atu t…ô- ¶i-r~…ĺi. sakadumaan , u pajwan a bina ¶adan ku jadańßaj a mu…ôn…ôn i ta-waŇč a k…ônis, sin-sijaŇč-r~…ĺan anijadu Ē~ °, ¶in-r~…ĺuŇč a k…ônis atu tu-r~…ĺiŇč a k…ônis, u amis a bina ¶adan sa i r~…ĺinubu nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a mu…ôn…ôn, nu mar~…ĺumanaj a ¶in-r~…ĺan atu u t…ô- ¶i-r~…ĺi.s ** piidaŇčan , taj-ma-r~…ĺi a k…ônis u a adińßan jadańß ku sinir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶an, idaw ku buju Ē~ ° idaw ku baju, idaw ku uŇčsiŇč, u kasibar~…ĺuan, u pika ¶awan tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, *******tu-r~…ĺijaŇč a pika ¶awan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj tu-r~…ĺijaŇč a pika ¶awan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj unu naajawaj tu a pika ¶awan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, i nai Ē~ ° ku kawaw dajńßan i **** a mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺad idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad nai Ē~ ° tu ku kawaw tu sakaj i pidaŇčan, ujida a mińß ¶aan sa ¶a ¶aj bataan nu bur~…ĺad idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad u tat…ôŇčaaj tu mar~…ĺawp…ôs. anu mi ¶umud u tuki tu d…ômid…ômiad nu sananar~…ĺ pituaj a tuki katukuńß i kar~…ĺabian …ôn…ômaj ku tuki, u sasinanutan a misakapańß sa ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômaw ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu kar~…ĺisiw. inapika ¶awan i naajaw unu masatukusaj, a buju Ē~ °, timuan a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj sasaŇčan a kakitidaan masaduma ku nisunpuan tu tar~…ĺakawaj a pika ¶awan tusir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, ¶a ¶aj a tatar~…ĺakawan u pińßańßar~…ĺan tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj atu pi ¶akajan tu paja, sakatusa a tar~…ĺakawan u kaka ¶awan, ja kaka ¶awan sa idaw ku sumanańßaj a nir~…ĺaŇčatan u masadumaaj u katin…ôŇčan, mutid…ôn itida ńßawsa tan…ôn tu namakapabaw a miadińß tu ¶a ¶…ôkawan i tajpinjaŇč a baju, kasiŇčaŇčan nu tajwan u sabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a pika ¶awan, sisa katuut ku tajniaj midaŇč a miadińß tu dadan nu simukinaj. . u ¶in- ¶…ôn, r~…ĺo-s…ô a bar~…ĺu, Ňčipi, sikijaw, pu-r~…ĺu-mi Ē~ °, u ¶ija, ńßu-r~…ĺoŇč a ńß…ô ¶i, bir~…ĺa Ē~ °, bar~…ĺu, usar~…ĺ, kuńßi. ******** ¶in- ¶…ôn a buju Ē~ ° u r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺajan a sinir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶ tu sikar~…ĺisiw, idaw ku sawa ¶ idaw ku ¶as ¶as idaw ku tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° idaw ńß…ôn ku masaapir~…ĺisaj a sawa ¶. i tiniaj a sawa ¶sawa ¶an u kapańßaj a kitidaan nu adipawnaj, anu makatukuńß tu i s…ôpataj-pituaj a bur~…ĺat u sand…ôb u piadińßan tu adipawnaj a d…ômiad. anu asip…ôn i ¶in- ¶…ôn a buju Ē~ ° ńßakaj idaw ku ¶a ¶aj bataan idaw ku war~…ĺuaj a adipawnaj, u aŇčaŇčan a masdumaaj u r~…ĺub…ôniaj a sakubad nu adipawnaj, anu masuŇčar~…ĺiw tu ku r~…ĺar~…ĺutaj, kasi…ônawannaj i ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj- ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tusaaj a bur~…ĺad nu i buju Ē~ °aj a dipawnaj nu tamaaj u kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan ku bar~…ĺuwaŇč tu a adińßan.
